mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECTS_SEQ .NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO project (projectId, projectType, pmoType, title, description, startDate, endDate, createdDate, status, progress) VALUES(#{projectId}, #{projectType}, #{pmoType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, SYSDATE, CASE WHEN #{endDate} < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 4 WHEN #{startDate} <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND #{endDate} >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, 0)

choose.otherwise: (INSTR(p.title, #{kwd}) > 0 OR INSTR(e.name, #{kwd}) > 0 OR INSTR(TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), #{kwd}) > 0 OR INSTR(TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{kwd}) > 0 OR INSTR(TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), #{kwd}) > 0 OR INSTR(TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{kwd}) > 0)

mapper.select: SELECT stageId AS stageId, sequence AS sequence FROM STAGE WHERE projectId = #{projectId} ORDER BY sequence
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TASK ( TASKID, STAGEID, TASKTITLE, TASKDESCRIPTION, TASKCREATOR, TASKSTATUS, TASKCREATEDDATE ) SELECT 'TSK' || LPAD(TASK_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 8, '0'), #{stageId}, jt.taskTitle, '', #{creator}, '1', SYSDATE FROM JSON_TABLE( #{tasks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '$[*]' COLUMNS ( taskTitle VARCHAR2(200) PATH '$.taskTitle' ) ) jt
mapper.select:
SELECT p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, CASE WHEN COUNT(e.NAME) > 1 THEN MIN(e.NAME) || ' 외 ' || (COUNT(e.NAME) - 1) || '명' ELSE MIN(e.NAME) END AS managerName, TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS endDate, TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE + 1) AS totalDays, CASE WHEN p.STARTDATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '시작 전' WHEN p.ENDDATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '종료' ELSE TO_CHAR(GREATEST(p.ENDDATE - TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1, 0)) || ' / ' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE + 1)) END AS remainDays, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS AS status FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE ep.ROLE = 'M'
AND
AND p.STATUS = #{status}
GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, p.STARTDATE, p.ENDDATE, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS ORDER BY p.PROJECTID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM ( SELECT p.PROJECTID FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE ep.ROLE = 'M'
AND
AND p.STATUS = #{status}
GROUP BY p.PROJECTID )

SELECT p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, p.PMOTYPE, p.DESCRIPTION, TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS endDate, TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE + 1) AS totalDays, CASE WHEN p.STARTDATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '시작 전' WHEN p.ENDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '종료' ELSE TO_CHAR(GREATEST(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - SYSDATE) + 1, 0)) || ' / ' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE + 1)) END AS remainDays, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS, LISTAGG(e.NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.NAME) AS managerName FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE p.PROJECTID = #{projectId} AND ep.ROLE = 'M' GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, p.PMOTYPE, p.DESCRIPTION, p.STARTDATE, p.ENDDATE, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS

SELECT ep.EMPID AS empId, e.NAME AS name, ep.ROLE AS role, ep.PREDECESSOR AS predecessorEmpId, prev_e.NAME AS predecessorName FROM EMPPROJECT ep JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE2 prev_e ON ep.PREDECESSOR = prev_e.EMPID
WHERE ep.PROJECTID = #{projectId}

SELECT p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.DESCRIPTION, p.STATUS, TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS endDate, p.PROGRESS, LISTAGG(e.NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.NAME) AS managerName FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE p.PROJECTID = #{projectId} AND ep.ROLE = 'M' GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.DESCRIPTION, p.STARTDATE, p.ENDDATE, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS
SELECT p.* FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.projectId = ep.projectId WHERE ep.empId = #{empId}

SELECT p.projectId, p.TITLE AS title, TO_CHAR(p.startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, p.status, p.progress, (SELECT MIN(e.NAME) FROM EMPPROJECT ep2 JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep2.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE ep2.PROJECTID = p.PROJECTID AND ep2.ROLE = 'M') AS managerName, CASE WHEN p.STARTDATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '시작 전' WHEN p.ENDDATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '종료' ELSE TO_CHAR(GREATEST(p.ENDDATE - TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1, 0)) || ' / ' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE + 1)) END AS remainDays FROM PROJECT p WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM EMPPROJECT ep WHERE ep.PROJECTID = p.PROJECTID AND ep.EMPID = #{empId} )
AND p.status = #{status}
AND p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{kwd} || '%'
ORDER BY p.projectId DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT p.STATUS AS status FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID WHERE ep.ROLE = 'M' GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.STATUS
SELECT p.STATUS AS status FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID WHERE ep.EMPID = #{empId} GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.STATUS
mapper.update: UPDATE PROJECT SET status = '2' WHERE status = '1' AND TRUNC(startDate) <= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
UPDATE PROJECT SET status = '5' WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(endDate) AND status NOT IN ('4', '6') AND progress < 100
UPDATE PROJECT SET status = '6' WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
UPDATE PROJECT SET status = '4' WHERE progress = 100 AND status NOT IN ('4', '6')
UPDATE PROJECT SET STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE PROJECTID = #{projectId}
